## Testing

- [ ] Integration tests added / updated

<!-- If manual testing, describe the steps you took. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Branch name follows `<milestone>/<label>/<name>` and the PR targets the correct branch
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits; any breaking change is flagged with `!` and has a tracking issue
- [ ] Code follows the existing naming and package conventions
- [ ] Automated checks (build, test, lint) pass
- [ ] No TODOs left uncommitted
- [ ] No debug output or commented-out code
- [ ] Relevant interfaces are unchanged (or a new issue has been raised if they need to change)
- [ ] README / docs updated if behaviour changed
